mundo.titulo: West Ham co-chair David Sullivan steps down after 'serious historic allegations'
mundo.resumen: Sullivan is stepping down from his position as joint chairman and director of the club with immediate effect "having been made aware of the impending publication of serious historic allegations".

mundo.titulo: Downing Street hits out at 'people seeking to stir division' after Vance's Nowak post
mundo.resumen: The US vice-president wrote the "only response is righteous anger" when referring to Henry Nowak's death on X.

mundo.titulo: The Nowak murder has lit a match under British politics. This is how we got here
mundo.resumen: The police response to the murder of Henry Nowak has triggered a heated transatlantic debate.

mundo.titulo: Ukrainian drones target St Petersburg in attack Russia calls 'unprecedented'
mundo.resumen: The city's governor urges residents to remain indoors for the first time since the beginning of the war.

mundo.titulo: Tributes to Buffy and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head after death aged 72
mundo.resumen: The British actor, who also appeared in Merlin and Little Britain, died of complications from pneumonia.

mundo.titulo: Giant banquets rile radical left in France
mundo.resumen: The feasting phenomenon run by Le Canon Français has become a hot political issue.

negocios.titulo: We need to stop AI developing without humans, says Anthropic co-founder
negocios.resumen: Jack Clark tells BBC's Newsnight AI could get to the point where it develops without human input.

negocios.titulo: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
negocios.resumen: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.

negocios.titulo: US stocks slump as fears over Big Tech shake Wall Street
negocios.resumen: The Nasdaq saw its biggest daily fall since early 2025.

negocios.titulo: Who can buy shares in Elon Musk's SpaceX?
negocios.resumen: From next week individual investors can take a stake in Musk's rockets-to-AI company.

negocios.titulo: Hospitality jobs boom as US prepares for World Cup
negocios.resumen: It is the third month in a row US jobs figures have beaten expectations.

negocios.titulo: The ancient trick making food waste useful and tasty
negocios.resumen: Instead of throwing away byproducts of food processing, fermentation is making them valuable.

tecnologia.titulo: Reid Hoffman is leaving Microsoft’s board to go ‘founder mode’ with  startup Manus
tecnologia.resumen: After a very profitable decade on Microsoft's board, Reid Hoffman is stepping down to focus on his AI drug discovery startup Manus.

tecnologia.titulo: Founders share VC horror stories, and some are naming names
tecnologia.resumen: A massive viral conversation sharing VC horror stories has taken place this week on X. Some are weird. Some are infuriating.

tecnologia.titulo: Former cyber executive turned whistleblower accuses IBM of covering up several data breaches
tecnologia.resumen: IBM and two of its subsidiary companies were allegedly breached during the mid-2010s — a lawsuit filed by a former cybersecurity executive accuses IBM of not disclosing and actively covering it up.

tecnologia.titulo: Startup Battlefield 200 applications officially close in 3 days
tecnologia.resumen: Applications for Startup Battlefield 200 officially close on June 8, 11:59 p.m. PT. Don't wait any longer. Secure your shot at competing on the Disrupt Stage at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 this October at San Francisco's Moscone West.

tecnologia.titulo: Google will pay SpaceX $920M per month for compute
tecnologia.resumen: In a statement, a Google representative described the deal as a result of unexpected demand for its recently launched AI products.

tecnologia.titulo: GM’s electric future depends on a new battery — and this facility
tecnologia.resumen: GM wants to slash EV prices by deploying new battery tech up to a year earlier than planned. This building is key to making that happen.

Apple has been on its back foot, AI-wise, for the past few years. But in a strange way, playing from behind might not be such a bad move. At WWDC on Monday, Apple appears to be getting ready to reintroduce us to the new Siri. Again. As a reminder, we met the new Siri in […]

tecnologia.titulo: More than a decade later, the team behind N++ is back with a multiplayer sequel
tecnologia.resumen: Back in 2015, the two-person studio Metanet released N++, a brutally hard 2D platformer that was a decade in the making, building off of previous releases dating back to the freeware Flash title N. At the time, cofounder Raigan Burns issued some famous last words: "We hope it's not another 10 years before we come […]

tecnologia.titulo: Grand Theft Auto VI is warping the video game release calendar
tecnologia.resumen: Who's afraid of the next GTA? Based on the last few days of Summer Game Fest, just about everyone. Grand Theft Auto VI hasn't been present at any of the keynote events, but its presence was felt every time a release date was announced. The month of November, when GTA VI launches, is virtually empty. […]

tecnologia.titulo: Final Fantasy VII’s remake trilogy will conclude with Revelation
tecnologia.resumen: Square Enix has officially announced the third and final game in its Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy: Final Fantasy VII Revelation. It will release on multiple platforms simultaneously - PC, PS5, Xbox Series X / S, and Nintendo Switch 2 - in spring 2027. In footage shown onstage at Summer Game Fest Live, there was […]

tecnologia.titulo: Control Resonant is a sequel — and also a starting point
tecnologia.resumen: Chronologically, Control Resonant is a sequel to 2019's Control. But in most other ways, the games aren't directly connected. To developer Remedy, they're more like two sides of the same coin. When Resonant was first revealed last year, creative director Mikael Kasurinen said you can play the games in any order. The world of Control […]
